text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned that Tokai Teio hasn't shown up for
training, I go looking for her. Soon enough, I find
her in front of the stress stump.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've heard that the students come here to let out
all their negative feelings of frustration, but
today...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll become just like Prez! I swear I will!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! I come here to pump myself up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's no rule saying you can only yell into the
stump when you're having a bad day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Shouting your hopes and dreams out loud makes
you feel refreshed and ready to take on anything!
choice_data_list: That's nice and all, but what about training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She apologizes to me over and over, and I can't
help but forgive her.
